items.title: AI日报
items.mainLine: 今日筛出 7 条 AI 技术信号，优先看 「WWW 2026 | RAG黑箱被打开!OpenDecoder把文档质量写进解码」、「JADEPUFFER is the first agentic ransomware operation and it exposes old security sins at machine speed」。脉络集中在大模型训练/推理、Agent Skill、Auto-Research/Harness 与可复制工程实践。

items.title: JADEPUFFER is the first agentic ransomware operation and it exposes old security sins at machine speed
items.summary: 这篇内容聚焦「Agent Skill、Harness、工具调用和自动化研发」。原文摘要显示：Security firm Sysdig describes an extortion attack where a language model broke in on its own, stole credentials, and destroyed databases. No human appeared to be at the controls. The article JADEPUFFER is the first age…
items.insightText: 重点看任务拆分、工具编排、验证闭环和可复用工程抽象，判断能否迁移到 Auto-Research / Agent Coding 链路。
